posts.author: stuartsjg (Stuart Graham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, from when this feature first came available many years ago ive found it very useful, being able to comment against a status change. Its just very annoying there’s no way to resize the box. I think it would make this feature much more useable:

posts.author: stuartsjg (Stuart Graham)
posts.cookedHtml: This should be an easy feature to implement, how do I get something like this noticed?
